title: Elytras+
description: Adds 100+ elytras to the game with CIT!
body:
Elytras+ and Textures+ Discord server: https://discord.gg/WCvwtzWThis was inspired by itembound, and I couldn't have done it without looking at it's files to see how it works. thank you to sixfootblue for the pride elytra textures!

Uses CIT to add 150+ more elytras to your game. Requires optifine or alternatives (CITResewn, Animatica, ETF) 

List of renames: [https://koaie.github.io/elytras/](https://koaie.github.io/elytras/) (thanks to @kowae on discord!)
